name: Talked to insurance adjuster after back injury at work, did I mess up?
description: Stop talking; get lawyer to handle adjuster.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after back injury at work, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stop talking; get lawyer to handle adjuster.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly; statements can be twisted to deny.**

Adjusters minimize; recorded calls harm claims.[1]

- Don't discuss without lawyer.
- Request all in writing.
- Avoid admitting fault.

Hire attorney now to counter; they negotiate better.[1] Common mistake.
